basic_details.job_title: JSSH Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 33 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Janakpuri Super Speciality Hospital (JSSH) Senior Resident Notification 2026 has been released on the official website jsshs.org. A total of 33 vacancies have been announced through the JSSH Senior Resident Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.age_details: Max 50 years for Bio-Chemistry, Pathology, Microbiology. Max 45 years for others (UR/EWS), relaxable by 5 years for SC/ST and 3 years for OBC.
age_limit.details: Maximum 50 years for Bio-Chemistry, Pathology, Microbiology. Maximum 45 years for others (UR/EWS). Age relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST and 3 years for OBC.

qualification.education_qualification: DM/MCH/DrNB/MD/MS in concerned specialty OR MD/MS in basic specialty with 3 years experience OR MBBS with 03 years experience.
qualification.details: DM/MCH/DrNB/MD/MS in concerned specialty MD/MS in basic specialty with 3 years experience out of which 1 year preferably in concerned super speciality MBBS with 03 years experience out of which 02 years of concerned specialty

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 67,700/- plus admissible allowances per month
salary_details.details: As per Revised Pay Rules Level 11 (Rs. 67,700/- plus admissible allowances per month)

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.jsshs.org.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 26-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the JSSH Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the JSSH Senior Resident posts is 26 May 2026. Candidates are advised to ensure their applications reach the office before the specified deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies for Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 33 vacancies announced for the Senior Resident posts at Janakpuri Super Speciality Hospital (JSSH).

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a DM/MCH/DrNB/MD/MS in the concerned specialty, or an MD/MS in a basic specialty with 3 years of experience, or an MBBS with 3 years of experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to these posts?
faq.answer: The age limit is a maximum of 50 years for Bio-Chemistry, Pathology, and Microbiology, and a maximum of 45 years for other categories (UR/EWS). Age relaxations are applicable for SC/ST and OBC candidates.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Senior Resident positions?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary as per Revised Pay Rules Level 11, which is Rs. 67,700/- plus admissible allowances per month.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for the JSSH Senior Resident recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. Candidates need to download the application form from the official website, fill it out, and submit it along with required documents to the specified address before the last date.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application fee for the Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 1000 for Unreserved candidates and Rs. 500 for OBC/SC/ST/EWS candidates. Persons with Disabilities (PWD) are exempted from the fee.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these positions?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Walk-in Assessment followed by an Interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where will the walk-in assessment and interview be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in assessment and interview will be conducted at Janakpuri Super Speciality Hospital (JSSH), C-2B, Janakpuri, New Delhi - 110058.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a contractual job?
faq.answer: Yes, the Senior Resident posts are on a contract basis.
